questionHtml:
A pure sample of radioactive nuclide X decays into a stable nuclide Y.

What is number of atoms of Ynumber of atoms of X after two half-lives?


A.  1

B.  2

C.  3

D.  4

meta.title: A pure sample of radioactive nuclide X decays into a stable nuclide Y. What is number of atoms of Ynumber of atoms of X after two half-lives? A. 1 B. 2 C. 3 D. 4
